item.title: 巴西奥里杰姆公司转向地下天然气储存以增强电网
item.description: 巴西能源公司Origem Energia SA计划在该国地下岩洞储存天然气，以此作为价格对冲策略，旨在支撑该国依赖可再生能源的电网，并吸引耗电量巨大的数据中心。【原文：Origem Energia SA plans to store natural gas in caverns in Brazil in a price hedging strategy to shore up the nation’s renewable-reliant grid and attract power-hungry data centers.】

item.title: 纳斯达克计划推出纳斯达克100指数的预测市场"是或否"期权
item.description: 纳斯达克公司计划推出期权合约，允许投资者对主要股指进行"是/否"押注，成为最新一家在快速增长的预测市场中推出创新产品的交易所运营商。【原文：Nasdaq Inc. plans to roll out options contracts that would allow yes-or-no bets on a major stock index, the latest exchange operator to put its own spin on fast-growing prediction markets.】

item.title: 安联投资关注美元走势，中东冲突重燃避险资产押注
item.description: 安联环球投资公司正考虑买入美元，此前数月该公司一直押注美元走弱。随着中东战争重燃美元作为避险资产的地位，该公司转变了策略。【原文：Allianz Global Investors is considering purchasing dollars after months betting against the US currency as the war in the Middle East revives its status as a haven asset.】

item.title: 甲骨文健康业务高管离职，埃里森押注陷入困境
item.description: 甲骨文公司旗下医疗记录部门近月来接连失去多位高级管理人员，而该公司正面临客户流失的严峻局面，亟需推进软件现代化进程。【原文：Oracle Corp.’s health records division has lost multiple senior leaders in recent months while the company works to modernize its software in the face of steep customer loses.】

item.title: 巴拉圭央行行长面临低通胀的"甜蜜烦恼"
item.description: 卡洛斯·卡瓦略面临着令多数央行行长羡慕的难题：巴拉圭通胀率略显低迷，这位货币当局主席正着手降息以提振物价。【原文：Carlos Carvallo faces a challenge most central bankers would envy. Inflation is a touch too low in Paraguay and the monetary authority’s chairman is starting to cut rates in an effort to boost prices.】

item.title: 英伟达将向数据中心光通信公司投资40亿美元
item.description: 英伟达公司同意向两家开发数据中心光学的公司投资40亿美元，这些技术对人工智能系统至关重要。【原文：Nvidia Corp. agreed to invest $4 billion in two companies that develop data center optics that are essential for artificial intelligence systems.】

item.title: 伊朗危机正加剧石油市场的看涨趋势
item.description: 对桶装商品过剩的担忧正转向对其安全性的忧虑。【原文：Expectations for a glut of barrels are shifting to concerns about their safety.】

item.title: 旅游预订平台Navan推出人工智能"行政助理"
item.description: 纳文公司正推出一款人工智能助手，旨在帮助其企业差旅预订平台赢得更多企业客户。【原文：Navan Inc. is rolling out an artificial-intelligence assistant aimed at helping the corporate travel-booking platform win more business customers.】

item.title: 交易员削减对英国央行降息的押注，认为3月降息概率不足50%
item.description: 交易员大幅削减对英国央行降息的押注，此前能源价格飙升加剧了通胀担忧。【原文：Traders aggressively trimmed bets on Bank of England interest-rate cuts, after soaring energy prices fueled inflation fears.】

item.title: 美国盘前活跃股：AES、亚马逊、美国航空、埃克森美孚、UniQure
item.description: 截至纽约时间上午7点45分，标普500指数期货下跌1.2%，伊朗爆发军事冲突令全球市场动荡不安。【原文：S&P 500 Index futures are down 1.2% as of 7:45 a.m. in New York as the eruption of military conflict in Iran rattled global markets.】

item.title: 黑石旗下BREIT基金净流入创2022年以来新高
item.description: 黑石集团面向高净值人士设立的550亿美元房地产基金上月首次实现资金净流入，这是自2022年以来该基金首次在投资者资金流入超过支出的情况下实现盈利，表明商业地产领域市场情绪正在回升。【原文：Blackstone Inc.’s $55 billion real estate fund for wealthy individuals last month took in more money from investors than it paid out for the first time since 2022, a sign of rebounding sentiment in the commercial-property sector.】

item.title: 亚马逊人工智能支出激增致股价创数年最差月度表现
Anthropic的Claude聊天机器人对数千用户服务中断
item.description: 据监测网站Downdetector报道，人工智能公司Anthropic旗下热门聊天机器人Claude于周一遭遇服务中断，数千名用户报告了相关问题。【原文：Anthropic PBC’s popular artificial intelligence chatbot Claude experienced service disruptions on Monday, with thousands of users reporting issues, according to monitoring website Downdetector.】

item.title: 中东冲突对全球韧性构成又一次压力测试
item.description: 过去一年间，经济学家们一直在模拟唐纳德·特朗普混乱的贸易战可能带来的影响。如今，他们评估的是一场真实的贸易战。【原文：For the past year, economists have modeled the impact of Donald Trump’s chaotic trade war. Now, it’s a real war they’re assessing.】

item.title: 特朗普抛弃经济外交，转向战争的强权政治
item.description: 通过关税等手段施加经济压力已显现其局限性【原文：Economic arm-twisting with tools like tariffs showed its limitations】

item.title: 贝莱德旗下全球基础设施部门与EQT集团以107亿美元收购AES公司
item.description: 贝莱德旗下全球基础设施合伙公司与EQT集团达成协议，将以约107亿美元现金收购AES公司。随着市场对能为能源饥渴型人工智能数据中心供电的发电厂开发商需求升温，此类并购活动正日益活跃。【原文：BlackRock Inc.’s Global Infrastructure Partners LP and EQT AB agreed to buy AES Corp. for about $10.7 billion in cash as the market heats up for power plant developers that can provide electricity for energy-hungry AI data centers.】

item.title: 卡塔尔关闭全球最大液化天然气出口工厂，油价飙升
item.description: 卡塔尔关闭了全球最大液化天然气出口设施的生产，此前该设施遭到伊朗无人机袭击。此举导致欧洲天然气价格飙升逾50%，并引发全球能源市场剧烈震荡。【原文：Qatar shut down liquefied natural gas production at the world’s largest export facility after it was targeted in an Iranian drone attack, sending European gas prices surging more than 50% and rattling global energy markets.】

item.title: 卡塔尔因遭袭击暂停全球最大液化天然气工厂生产
item.description: 卡塔尔能源公司在一份声明中表示，在拉斯拉凡天然气液化厂遭到军事袭击后，该公司已停止液化天然气生产。【原文：QatarEnergy ceased liquefied natural gas production after military attacks on its Ras Laffan complex, the company said in a statement.】

item.title: 欧洲央行委员温施称不会对油价飙升“仓促”反应
item.description: 欧洲央行管理委员会成员皮埃尔·温施表示，目前他倾向于忽略中东冲突引发的能源价格上涨。【原文：European Central Bank Governing Council member Pierre Wunsch said he’s inclined for now to look past the jump in energy prices caused by the fighting in the Middle East.】

item.title: 英伟达黄仁勋表示软件抛售忽略了人工智能的长期效益
item.description: 最大供应商或将采用人工智能技术助力客户业务提升【原文：Biggest providers likely to adapt AI to improve customers’ businesses】

item.title: SAP重组董事会，首席执行官克莱因将专注于人工智能开发
item.description: SAP SE首席执行官克里斯蒂安·克莱因宣布了一项重组执行委员会的计划，并表示将亲自加大对人工智能的关注力度。这家欧洲最有价值的软件公司正面临来自该技术的日益增大的压力。【原文：SAP SE Chief Executive Officer Christian Klein announced a plan to shake up its executive board and said he will personally boost his focus on artificial intelligence as Europe’s most valuable software company faces increasing pressure from the technology.】

item.title: 智利经济在关键利率决议前录得温和月度增长
item.description: 智利央行报告称，随着矿业复苏，该国经济活动在1月份实现连续第二个月增长。投资者正权衡政策制定者是否会在3月下旬降息。【原文：Chile’s economic activity grew for the second straight month in January as mining bounced back, the central bank reported as investors mull whether policymakers will cut their interest rate later in March.】

item.title: 力拓批准斥资4.73亿美元扩建南非矿山
item.description: 力拓集团批准其理查兹湾矿业公司斥资4.73亿美元扩建矿山，结束了该南非项目长达数月的停工状态。【原文：Rio Tinto Group approved a $473 million mine expansion at its Richards Bay Minerals unit, ending a prolonged suspension of the South African project.】

item.title: 瑞士央行扬言干预外汇市场，伊朗危机引发市场动荡
item.description: 瑞士国家银行表示，已做好干预外汇市场的准备，并强化了对外汇市场的立场，以应对伊朗危机引发的连锁反应。【原文：The Swiss National Bank said it stands ready to intervene in currency markets, hardening its tone on foreign exchange to respond to reverberations from the Iran crisis.】

item.title: 摩根士丹利的威尔逊表示，伊朗不太可能削弱看涨观点
item.description: 摩根士丹利策略师认为，伊朗和中东地区冲突的爆发不太可能动摇他们对美国股市的乐观预期，除非油价出现急剧且持续的上涨。【原文：Morgan Stanley strategists see the eruption of conflict in Iran and the Middle East as unlikely to derail their bullish view on US stocks, barring a sharp and sustained surge in oil prices.】

item.title: 美国对伊朗发动袭击推高油价，股市应声下跌
item.description:
霍尔木兹海峡几乎全面关闭航运通道，金价上涨，油价飙升。

【原文：

Gold rallies, oil prices surge as Strait of Hormuz all but closed to shipping.

】

item.title: 摩根大通在杠杆收购中测试"可能性的艺术"
item.description: 去年摩根大通牵头为艺电公司550亿美元的收购案提供融资，创下杠杆收购纪录。华尔街视此为信号，预示着为巨额私募股权交易提供资金的丰厚时期可能强势回归。【原文：When JPMorgan Chase & Co. took the lead last year in financing the $55 billion takeover of Electronic Arts Inc., a record-setting leveraged buyout, Wall Street saw it as a sign that a lucrative period of bankrolling super-sized private equity deals might come roaring back.】

item.title: "美国优先"概念股光环褪色，人工智能与政策困境持续发酵
item.description: 美国股市正经历着某种程度的报应，这曾令世界羡慕许久。【原文：The US stock market is having what, for the longtime envy of the world, amounts to something of a comeuppance.】

item.title: 交易员削减对美联储、英国央行降息的押注，因战争加剧通胀担忧
item.description: 周一，由于中东战争推高油价并加剧通胀担忧，货币市场削减了对美国、英国和欧元区降息的押注。【原文：Money markets scaled back wagers on interest-rate cuts in the US, UK and euro area on Monday as war in the Middle East sent oil prices higher and fanned inflation fears.】

item.title: 移动巨头在2026年世界移动通信大会上应对人工智能热潮与地缘政治挑战
item.description: 在本周举行的移动通信行业年度盛会上，电信公司正努力证明：通过建立新的合作伙伴关系并推动人工智能驱动的创新，能够克服因需求激增和地缘政治因素而面临的供应链压力。【原文：At the mobile industry’s biggest annual gathering this week, telecom companies are trying to show that new partnerships and artificial intelligence-driven innovation can overcome supply chains strained by surging demand and geopolitics.】
